name: Vertex Tax Technology API
what_it_does: Enterprise tax technology platform with REST API — calculating sales tax, VAT, GST, and other indirect taxes for complex enterprise scenarios with deep ERP integration (SAP, Oracle, Salesforce), multi-jurisdiction support, and tax content database with 1,000+ jurisdictions.
use_cases: Calculating sales tax for complex multi-jurisdiction e-commerce orders via API
Computing VAT/GST for B2B international transactions via real-time API
Integrating Vertex tax engine with SAP/Oracle/Salesforce for order processing
Querying tax rates and rules for specific product types and jurisdictions
Automating tax return preparation data from transaction tax records
not_for: Simple US e-commerce sales tax (use TaxJar or Avalara for simpler cases)
Startups with basic tax needs (pricing is enterprise)
best_when: A large enterprise with complex tax requirements (multi-jurisdiction, international VAT, ERP-integrated) needs enterprise-grade tax engine with 1,000+ jurisdiction coverage and deep SAP/Oracle integration.
avoid_when: You have simple US-only sales tax needs, are a small business, or the enterprise pricing is prohibitive.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials for enterprise API access. Bearer token auth. Company-scoped access. API keys for legacy integration. New REST API uses OAuth2; legacy SOAP API uses different auth. SDK handles token management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; sandbox for testing
pricing.notes: Enterprise-only pricing. US-based (King of Prussia, PA). Public company (VERX). Founded 1978 — tax technology pioneer. Deep ERP integrations. 1,100+ tax jurisdictions. 10,000+ customers. 5,000+ employees. Leading competitor to Avalara in enterprise segment.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API (newer) alongside legacy SOAP API. OAuth2 client credentials. Good documentation for core tax calculation. Legacy SOAP integration for older ERP connectors. Product codes and tax categories require configuration before API use. Tax content updates automatic.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Tax calculation queries are stateless and always idempotent — same inputs produce same outputs. Transaction recording not idempotent. Tax rate queries fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Legacy SOAP API vs newer REST API — use REST for new integrations
Product/service codes (Vertex product group codes) required for accurate tax
ERP connector configuration often required before API-level integration
Enterprise pricing — API access requires sales engagement

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and ISO27001 certified. GDPR compliant. Public company (VERX) — enterprise security standards. OAuth2 client credentials. US and EU data residency. Tax data handled with financial services security standards. Annual audits.
